candidate_definition_hints.text: Bottom-up attention model for image captioning and VQA, based on Faster R-CNN and Visual Genome
This code implements a bottom-up attention model, based on multi-gpu training of Faster R-CNN with ResNet-101, using object and attribute annotations from [Visual Genome](http://visualgenome.org/).

candidate_glosses.text: This code implements a bottom-up attention model, based on multi-gpu training of Faster R-CNN with ResNet-101, using object and attribute annotations from [Visual Genome](http://visualgenome.org/).
